name: Spirit
fact: Mars Exploration Rover A. Designed for a 90-sol primary mission; lasted 2,208 sols. Discovered evidence that Gusev Crater had once held volcanic-water interaction. Got stuck in soft soil at "Troy" in 2009; the team kept Spirit running as a stationary platform until the last contact in March 2010.
capability: First long-distance Mars rover; demonstrated multi-year robotic geology on the Martian surface.
